final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo of stylish coffee and dessert in a Korean cafe style, smartphone-shot for Instagram, no people.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Instagram aesthetic, Korean cafe style, hand-drawn annotations with white pen lines, rough uneven single-stroke style, contour lines tracing objects, arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance, steam sparkles hearts small emoticons, Instagram story style, magazine rough notes style
Composition: overhead/tabletop view suitable for Instagram flat lay
Subject: coffee and dessert, no people
Scene/backdrop: Korean cafe interior
Lighting/mood: natural cafe lighting
Color palette: warm cafe tones
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), short diary-like comments: 飲み物→味・温度・気持ち(例:さっぱり、優しい甘み), 食べ物→食感・美味しさ(例:しっとり、最高), 空間→雰囲気(例:リラックス、素敵な時間), 全体→一言まとめ(例:幸せすぎる～)
Constraints: hand-drawn annotations on each element, leave blank space, not excessive decoration
Avoid: people, cluttered composition, over-decoration
